title: Kalevala: The Tragedy of Kullervo
description: The slave Kullervo, abused since birth, unknowingly commits incest and kills himself — the darkest story in Finnish mythology. Tolkien based Turin Turambar on this.
introduction: The slave Kullervo, abused since birth, unknowingly commits incest and kills himself — the darkest story in Finnish mythology. Tolkien based Turin Turambar on this.

translation.text: Kullervo, son of Kalervo, drew his sword and asked it: 'Are you willing to eat guilty flesh?' The sword answered: 'Why would I not?'
